scenarios.scenario-1: Fresh Ubuntu host completes install and prints the final portal URL.
scenarios.scenario-1b: Fresh Ubuntu host walks through guided manual wildcard DNS-01 and reaches compose startup only after TXT propagation is confirmed.
scenarios.scenario-1c: Fresh Ubuntu host imports an existing `fullchain.pem` and `privkey.pem` pair and reaches compose startup without invoking Certbot.
scenarios.scenario-2: Invalid domain, missing sudo, interrupted package install, or incomplete manual DNS propagation returns actionable operator guidance without skipping wildcard issuance.
scenarios.scenario-3: Rerun after partial install remains idempotent and does not corrupt `.env` or volumes.
scenarios.scenario-4: Installer materializes a dedicated `PROXY_SECRET_SALT` that stays distinct from `PROXY_SECRET_HEX`.

critical-invariants.invariant-1: `BASE_DOMAIN` and `RESEND_API_KEY` remain the first interactive prompts.
critical-invariants.invariant-2: Generated proxy secret, per-SNI salt, and env file are persisted before compose startup.
critical-invariants.invariant-3: When `TLS_MODE=use-existing`, installer validates and stages certificate files before compose startup.

side-effects.effect-1: Installs Docker packages on the host.
side-effects.effect-2: Creates `.env`, certificate paths, and starts containers.

redaction-rules.rule-1: Never log `RESEND_API_KEY`, proxy secret, or full `.env` contents.

verification-levels.module-local: Script lint and isolated smoke checks.
verification-levels.wave-level: Install plus certificate bootstrap plus compose start on a disposable host.
verification-levels.phase-level: End-to-end bootstrap reaching portal health on `https://BASE_DOMAIN`.

production-gates.gate-1: Installer blocks on missing wildcard DNS-01 prerequisites instead of faking success.
production-gates.gate-2: Final portal URL is emitted only after compose startup is invoked.
production-gates.gate-3: Guided manual DNS-01 waits for operator confirmation and propagation visibility before compose startup.
production-gates.gate-4: Installer never reuses `PROXY_SECRET_HEX` as the per-SNI salt value.
